tldr: Heritage Burlington Advisory Committee met virtually to discuss ongoing heritage projects, approve a revised communication plan for property evaluations, and receive updates on Heritage Week activities and virtual heritage tours. The meeting included discussion about heritage property designation priorities and protection mechanisms.

items.title: Approval of May 12, 2021 minutes
items.notes: Committee approved the previous meeting minutes as presented without amendment.

items.title: Heritage Planner update on various projects
items.notes: Staff provided updates on heritage property evaluations, downtown cultural heritage assessment responses, and upcoming Ontario Heritage Act amendments effective July 1, 2021.

items.title: Communication Plan for evaluations and letter to property owners
items.notes: Committee reviewed and approved a revised communication plan and letter template, noting improvements in clarity and tone, with suggestion to add more information about Heritage Burlington in FAQ section.

items.title: Chair's update on committee annual report
items.notes: Chair reported on attendance at Corporate Services committee meeting regarding the annual report and work plan, noting need to clarify status explanations for final Council approval on June 22.

items.title: Heritage Week update and planning
items.notes: Committee received update on Heritage Week activities for August, with hope for in-person events as COVID restrictions ease, and confirmation of City Talk newsletter promotion.

items.title: Virtual heritage tours presentation
items.notes: Staff presented three completed virtual heritage tours (Queenshead, St. Luke's Parish, and Old Library) that will be available online and accessible via mobile devices for Heritage Week.

items.title: Discussion on heritage designation priorities
items.notes: Committee discussed designation of City-owned properties, protection mechanisms for heritage properties, penalties for unauthorized demolition, and heritage tree identification processes.

items.title: Updates on Freeman Station rail cars and heritage infrastructure
items.notes: Committee received updates on arrival of historic rail cars at Freeman Station and status of King Edward Fountain repairs and Brant Inn panel installation.
